S.FORM: Ameenah Gurib I 1959 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 17 a romi'ad masofoc ci Ameenah Gurib, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Mauritus anini i ci Ameenah Gurib, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 5 a romi'ad. Kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô
S.PHON: am…ô…ônańß *o~u~urib~b~v i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i am…ô…ônańß *o~u~urib~b~v, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u mao~u~urito~u~us anini i ¶i am…ô…ônańß *o~u~urib~b~v, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. kaso~ufo~u ¶an a …ĺo~uma ° **** …ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ ** sa…ĺikaka **** nataja…ĺan ** pito~uo~uran **
S.FORM: Ameenah Gurib I 1959 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 17 a romi'ad masofoc ci Ameenah Gurib, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Mauritus anini i ci Ameenah Gurib, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 5 a romi'ad. Kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô
